title: Mumbai Harbour Boat Rental: Prices, Tips & Best Boats 2026
html:
Choosing a boat to rent in Mumbai Harbour depends on your group size, budget, and how you want to experience this busy waterway. Depart from the Gateway of India or the Taj Mahal Palace jetty and expect to pay from 5,000 INR for a shared tour to 60,000 INR for a private luxury yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local owners offering everything from speedboats to crewed catamarans.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Mumbai Harbour?

Prices start from 5,000 INR for a shared tour and rise to 80,000 INR for a full‑day crewed yacht. A half‑day self‑drive motorboat (up to 6 guests) costs 12,000, 18,000 INR; a full‑day catamaran for 10 people ranges from 40,000 to 60,000 INR. Luxury yachts with captain and crew exceed 60,000 INR per day.

Where to set off in Mumbai Harbour

Most rentals depart from the Gateway of India jetty, the Apollo Bunder waterfront, or the private marina at the Taj Mahal Palace hotel. The Mandwa jetty on the mainland is a popular launch point for trips to Elephanta Island. Boats also leave from the Ferry Wharf (Bhaucha Dhakka) and the Sassoon Dock area near Colaba.

Which boat to rent

  1. Speedboat, best for thrill‑seekers wanting a fast trip to Elephanta Island; carries 4, 6 guests, from 8,000 INR per hour. A common model available through BoatHire24 is the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open, 150 HP; you can browse this speedboat listing for live availability.
  2. Sailing yacht, ideal for a relaxed half‑day sail with friends; up to 8 guests, from 25,000 INR for 4 hours.
  3. Catamaran, spacious and stable for larger groups (10, 12 guests); half‑day from 35,000 INR, full day from 55,000 INR.
  4. Luxury motor yacht, crewed charter for up to 12 guests, including a sun deck and cabin; from 60,000 INR for a full day.
  5. Fishing boat, purpose‑built angling trips for 4, 6 people, with gear included; from 10,000 INR for half a day.

Cost breakdown for common rental options

  • Shared sunset cruise (2 hours): 5,000, 7,000 INR per person
  • Small motorboat half‑day (self‑drive, 4 pax): 12,000, 15,000 INR
  • Catamaran full‑day (10 pax, crewed): 50,000, 60,000 INR
  • Luxury crewed yacht full‑day (12 pax, with catering): 65,000, 80,000 INR

To compare current rates and availability, browse boats for your dates and refine by capacity, duration, and price.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Mumbai Harbour?

No licence is required for a crewed charter, but self‑drive boats typically require a valid boating licence recognised in India. The operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking. For safety, most first‑time visitors opt for a captain‑inclusive rental.

If you plan to visit Elephanta Island, leave by 7:00 am to avoid the midday heat and afternoon sea breeze that can make the return choppy. Many skippers recommend a morning departure for the best sea conditions.

The peak season runs from October to March, when the north‑easterly winds create calm seas. Monsoon months (June, September) see reduced services and frequent harbour closures.

At a glance

  • Price band: 5,000, 80,000 INR per trip
  • Peak months: October to March
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 4 to 12 people
  • Currency: Indian Rupee (INR)
  • Licence: Required for self‑drive unless on a crewed boat

Questions about boat rental in Mumbai Harbour

Can I rent a boat for a private party in Mumbai Harbour?

Yes, many catamarans and motor yachts are available for private events such as birthdays or corporate gatherings, with catering options arranged by the owner.

How far is Elephanta Island from the Gateway of India?

The distance is approximately 10 nautical miles, and a speedboat takes about 20 minutes each way; standard ferry services take roughly one hour.

Are children allowed on boat rentals?

Children are generally welcome on crewed charters, but life jackets must be worn. Check the specific boat listing for age restrictions and safety equipment.

What is the cancellation policy for Mumbai Harbour boat rentals?

Policies vary by owner, but most offer a full refund if cancelled 48 hours in advance; weather‑related cancellations are typically handled by the operator.

BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare verified boat listings in Mumbai Harbour, whether you want a crewed luxury yacht or a self‑drive speedboat. If you own a boat, you can list it on the platform to reach thousands of renters. For all options, browse the listings directly.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Mumbai Harbour and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
